testcase.name: testSignup

failure.message: Signup should succeed for valid input. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Signup should succeed for valid input. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at tests.SignupTest.testSignup(SignupTest.java:38) at
